description: Mount/unmount lifecycle scenarios for inspector detail panes. Each scenario describes the expected mount/unmount/fetch behavior when the user changes selection.

scenarios.name: initial-device-selection
scenarios.rationale: No previous pane exists. DeviceDetailPane mounts fresh and fetches.

scenarios.name: same-kind-different-id-device
scenarios.rationale: Same kind (device→device). React reuses component instance. Hook refetches due to ID change.

scenarios.name: same-kind-same-id-device
scenarios.rationale: Same kind, same ID. No state change. Hook useCallback dep unchanged, no refetch.

scenarios.name: cross-kind-device-to-detection
scenarios.rationale: Different kind. React unmounts DeviceDetailPane, mounts DetectionDetailPane.

scenarios.name: cross-kind-detection-to-alert
scenarios.rationale: Different kind. React unmounts DetectionDetailPane, mounts AlertDetailPane.

scenarios.name: cross-kind-alert-to-device
scenarios.rationale: Different kind. React unmounts AlertDetailPane, mounts DeviceDetailPane.

scenarios.name: clear-to-device
scenarios.rationale: From cleared state. DeviceDetailPane mounts fresh.
